memoryArtifacts.headline: The Visitation of Gloucestershire, taken in the year 1623 Page 125
memoryArtifacts.description: The visitation of the county of Gloucester, taken in the year 1623 by Chitting, Henry, d. 1638; College of Arms (Great Britain); Philipot, John, 1589?-1645; Camden, William, 1551-1623; Heane, William Crawshay, 1849- joint ed; Maclean, John, Sir, 1811-1895 Publication date 1885 Topics Visitations, Heraldic -- England Gloucestershire, Heraldry -- England Gloucestershire, Gloucestershire (England) -- Genealogy, genealogy Publisher London

zh.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq是Richard Poole和Unknown first wife的兒子，於大約1477年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可利。他於大約1509年與Katherine Brydges在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1539年9月30日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾薩培頓享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾薩培頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq是Richard Poole和Unknown first wife的儿子，于大约1477年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可利。他于大约1509年与Katherine Brydges在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1539年9月30日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾薩培頓享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾薩培頓。

nameMeanings.name: Poole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pol(e), polle, poul(e) ‘pool, pond’ (Old English pōl). The name may be topographic, for someone who lived by a pool, or habitative, from a place so named.
Possibly an Americanized form of German Puhl or Pfuhl(e) (see Pool 4).

variants.name: Pool
meanings: English: variant of   Poole   or   Paul  .
Jewish (from the Netherlands) and Dutch: ethnic name for someone from Poland.

variants.name: Pooler
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): topographic name for someone who lived near a pool, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with this word (see   Poole  ).
Americanized form of French   Poulin   ‘young animal, colt’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of German Pfuhler, a variant of Pfuhl + -er, suffix denoting an inhabitant.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Leonard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic origin, derived from leon ‘lion’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of a 5th-century Frankish saint, the patron of peasants and horses. Although it was introduced into Britain by the Normans, Leonard was an uncommon name during the Middle Ages. It was revived in some areas towards the end of the 1400s, and in the 19th‐century became very popular. It is now also common as a Jewish name ( compare Leon ).

variants.name: Lennard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Leonard  , in part a transferred use of the surname, which was derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq was born about 1477, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard Poole and Unknown first wife. He married Katherine Brydges about 1509, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 September 1539, in Sapperton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Sapperton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq est né environ 1477, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard Poole et Unknown first wife. Il a épousé Katherine Brydges environ 1509, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1539, à Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq wurde um 1477 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Richard Poole und Unknown first wife geboren. Er hat um 1509 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England Katherine Brydges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. September 1539 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Sapperton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sapperton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq è nato il circa 1477 nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richard Poole e Unknown first wife. Lui sposato Katherine Brydges circa 1509, nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 settembre 1539, nel Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esqは約1477年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーでRichard PooleとUnknown first wifeの息子として生まれた。約1509年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーでKatherine Brydgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1539年9月30日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアサップエルトンで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアサップエルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq(은)는 대략 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 Richard Poole(와)과 Unknown first wife의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1509년 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 Katherine Brydges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 9월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 사퍼턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 사퍼턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq nasceu aproximadamente 1477, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richard Poole e Unknown first wife. Ele casou-se com Katherine Brydges aproximadamente 1509, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1539, em Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Leonard Poole Esq родился около 1477 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Richard Poole и Unknown first wife. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Brydges около 1509 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 сентября 1539 г. в местности саппиртон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности саппиртон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Katherine Brydges aproximadamente 1509, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
